---
title: "BISC_preprocessing"
author: "Clazz"
date: "2026-05-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r, include = F}

if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")

pacman::p_load(tidyverse, VIM, ggpubr, ggeffects, car, sjPlot,caret, ggrain, emmeans, skimr, lavaan, patchwork, lme4, lmerTest, gtsummary, huxtable, readxl, broom.mixed, pwrss, mediation)

```


```{r}
data<-read_csv("G:/My Drive/Data/BISC/1115_barcelonabeta_cognition_v3/1115_barcelonabeta_cognition_v3.csv")%>%
  dplyr::select(id_bisc, age_12w_m, ethnicity_m_3cat, hospital_delivery, educ_level_m_3cat, sex_0y_c, delivery_type_m_2cat, C_hip, C_pree, C_peeg, C_hel,C_DG , gestage_0y_c_days, )%>%
  rename(subject = id_bisc,
         age = age_12w_m,
         ethnicity = ethnicity_m_3cat,
         education = educ_level_m_3cat,
         sex_child = sex_0y_c,
         gestational_diabates = C_DG,
         hellp = C_hel,
         preeclampsia_mild = C_pree,
         preeclampsia_severe = C_peeg,
         gest_age_birth = gestage_0y_c_days,
         )
```
